name: tasks_list
description: List all tasks with filtering by status, type, index UID, and date ranges. Tasks track asynchronous operations.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of tasks to return.

parameters.name: statuses
parameters.description: Comma-separated task statuses to filter by (enqueued, processing, succeeded, failed, canceled).

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Comma-separated task types to filter by.

parameters.name: indexUids
parameters.description: Comma-separated index UIDs to filter by.

parameters.name: beforeEnqueuedAt
parameters.description: Filter tasks enqueued before this date (ISO 8601).

parameters.name: afterEnqueuedAt
parameters.description: Filter tasks enqueued after this date (ISO 8601).
